# Code of Conduct / Codigo de Conducta

## English

This project follows the **Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct v2.1**.

Full text:
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

### Enforcement Contact

To report abusive, harassing, or otherwise unacceptable behavior, contact:
**erickj.cruzs@gmail.com**

All reports will be reviewed promptly and fairly, with respect for reporter privacy.

---

## Espanol

Este proyecto sigue el **Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct v2.1**.

Texto completo:
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/es/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

### Contacto para Aplicacion

Para reportar conductas abusivas, de acoso o inaceptables, escribe a:
**erickj.cruzs@gmail.com**

Todos los reportes se revisaran de forma pronta y justa, respetando la privacidad de quien reporta.

---

## Attribution / Atribucion

Adapted from / Adaptado de:
